articles.title: Worcester man receives life sentence for home invasion
articles.description:
One person was inside the home during the robbery. They were uninjured, the DA's office said.

The post Worcester man receives life sentence for home invasion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Worcester man sentenced to life for a home invasion incident.
One resident was present during the robbery but remained uninjured.
This ruling aims to enhance safety and deter similar crimes in Boston.

articles.title: Brewers beat stumbling Red Sox 8-6 behind Mitchell’s tiebreaking single and 3 hits from Yelich
articles.description:
Roman Anthony threw wildly to the plate, allowing a second run to score that made it 7-5.

The post Brewers beat stumbling Red Sox 8-6 behind Mitchell’s tiebreaking single and 3 hits from Yelich appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brewers defeated the Red Sox 8-6 on April 6, 2026.
Christian Yelich contributed three hits, enhancing his season performance.
Red Sox's loss raises concerns among fans about team performance.
